title: Accordion
intro: A vertically stacked set of interactive headings with expandable content.
singleStateDesc: When a new accordion opens, the other open one closes.
multiStateDesc: When a new accordion opens, the other open ones don't close.
richItemsDesc: AccordionItemComplex with flexible slots for avatars, badges, and rich content.
accessibleA: Yes. It adheres to WAI-ARIA standards and is fully keyboard navigable.
styledA: Yes. It comes with default styles that integrate seamlessly with your design system.
animatedA: Yes. It features smooth expand/collapse animations with cubic-bezier easing.
faq1Content1: An accordion component that organizes content into expandable sections.
faq1Content2: Click on any trigger to reveal the associated content panel.
faq2Content1: Use the global theme switcher in the navbar to change the accordion variant.
faq2Content2: All accordion components will update automatically to match the selected theme.
faq3Title: Can I use it with multiple sections open?
faq3Content1: Yes, set the type prop to "multiple" on the Accordion to allow multiple items open simultaneously.
faq3Content2: For single-expand behavior, use type="single" with the collapsible prop.
sarahBio: Sarah is a product designer with 5+ years of experience in creating user-centered digital experiences.
mikeBio: Mike is a full-stack engineer specializing in React, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure.
